null.method: non-identity longitudinal rotations of the binary target grid

correction: The earlier comparison of the one-feature H2 score with the full-model null used different statistics and was invalid. This artifact calibrates H2 against the same one-feature statistic under rotation.
limitations: The six-basin distance encoding is an approximate literature-motivated benchmark, not exhaustive ground truth for impact magnetization.
Benchmark recovery does not establish adequate power for the surface-TiO2 proxy or repair the approximately one effective spatial region.
The result is conditional on this map, age mask, block geometry, estimator, fold-comparability screen, and rotation construction.
Rotated prevalence varies where the shifted target intersects the fixed Imbrian mask; the accepted range is reported explicitly.
